channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Georgia fans show it's possible to be polite and still celebrate win over No. 3 Florida on the court
item.description: Georgia fans showed it’s possible to storm the court for a postgame celebration — and to be polite at the same time.
item.dc:creator: Charles Odum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Alex Ovechkin scores 30 goals in a season for an NHL-record-extending 19th time in 20-year career
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Alex Ovechkin reached 30 goals in a season for the 19th time in his 20-year NHL career, adding to the league record he set last season with his 18th. The Washington Capitals captain got his latest milestone goal Tuesday night at home against the Calgary Flames.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Maine legislature censures Rep. Laurel Libby for pointing out trans athlete who won girls' competition
item.description: The Maine House of Representatives voted to censure Rep. Laurel Libby for pointing out that a trans athlete won a girls' pole vault competition.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Georgia recovers from No. 3 Florida's comeback and defeat Gators 88-83 despite Richard's 30 points
item.description: ATHENS, Ga. (AP) — Georgia guard Blue Cain sank a go-ahead 3-pointer with 47 seconds remaining after No. 3 Florida took its first lead by scoring 13 unanswered points, and the Bulldogs beat the Gators 88-83 on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Diana Taurasi of the Phoenix Mercury retires after 20 WNBA seasons, 3 titles and 6 Olympic golds
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — Diana Taurasi is retiring after 20 seasons, ending one of the greatest careers in women's basketball history. The WNBA's career scoring leader and a three-time league champion, Taurasi announced her retirement on Tuesday in an interview with Time magazine.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL and DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: WATCH: President Trump will invite Eagles to White House following Super Bowl win
item.description: WASHINGTON (WPHL) -- After the Philadelphia Eagles won Super Bowl LIX, sources on Monday say the team is looking forward to receiving and would accept an invitation from The White House to celebrate their 40-22 victory over the Kansas City Chiefs.
item.dc:creator: Sean Reitze, PHL 17

item.title: Chelsea routs Southampton 4-0 on frustrating night for Cole Palmer. Brighton and Palace win
item.description: Chelsea wasn't so reliant on Cole Palmer this time. On a frustrating evening for the England star, his Chelsea teammates stepped up — as demanded by their manager — to share the goals in a 4-0 thrashing of last-place Southampton in the Premier League on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: STEVE DOUGLAS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Eagles coach Nick Sirianni pushes back against proposal to ban the tush push
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Philadelphia Eagles coach Nick Sirianni pushed back against the Green Bay Packers' proposal to ban the tush push. “I’ve seen some of the stuff that it’s an automatic play,” Sirianni said Tuesday at the NFL's scouting combine.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bucs' Rachaad White victim of alleged extortion that involves FBI, lawyers say
item.description: Lawyers for Tampa Bay Buccaneers running back Rachaad White said in a statement on Tuesday that he is a victim of extortion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bengals plan to make All-Pro receiver Ja'Marr Chase the NFL's highest-paid non-quarterback
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — The Cincinnati Bengals plan to make All-Pro wide receiver Ja’Marr Chase the highest-paid non-quarterback in the NFL. “He is going to end up being the No. 1 paid non-quarterback in the league,” director of player personnel Duke Tobin said Tuesday at the NFL scouting combine.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL legend Rob Gronkowski 'considering' return to league: report
item.description: NFL legendary tight end Rob Gronkowski is reportedly considering a return to the league, with the report mentioning ties to Denver Broncos head coach Sean Payton.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texas sues NCAA demanding mandatory gender testing to keep trans athletes out of women's sports
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton is suing the NCAA, demanding it begin mandatory sex screening to keep trans athletes out of women's sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: CFP commissioners put off any decisions on changes to playoff format, including seeding of teams
item.description: Conference commissioners who are part of the College Football Playoff have put off any decisions on potential changes to the format, including how the 12-team field is seeded.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Hawkins, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Girls Softball: Christian 5, El Capitan 3
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Spring sports underway with Christian beating El Capitan on Monday afternoon 5-3. Eagles were lead by Ava Barrios, Long Beach State commit was dominate in the circle going five innings with 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Sabres announcer drops colorful language on live broadcast after taking puck to the face
item.description: Buffalo Sabres broadcaster Rob Ray didn't miss a beat after being stuck in the face with a deflected puck during Saturday's game against the New York Rangers.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jazz late comeback falls short against Portland
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Anfernee Simons had 28 points and out six assists to lead the Portland Trail Blazers to a 114-112 victory over the Utah Jazz on Monday night. Keyonte George, who scored 21 points, missed a 25-foot three-pointer at the buzzer that would have won the game.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Texas is No. 1 in women's AP Top 25 for the first time in 21 years; NC State climbs into top 10
item.description: Texas is No. 1 in The Associated Press Top 25 women's basketball poll for the first time in 21 years and became the third different team to hold the top spot in the past three weeks. The Longhorns moved atop the poll Monday after previous No. 1 Notre Dame lost in double overtime to N.C.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cleveland Guardians owner Lawrence J. Dolan dies at 94
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Lawrence J. Dolan, owner of Cleveland's Major League Baseball team since 2000, has died. He was 94. Dolan died Sunday night of natural causes, the Cleveland Guardians said Monday in a statement. “Mr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Chen and Kerrigan are added to cast of a figure skating event benefiting victims of DC plane crash
item.description: Nathan Chen, Nancy Kerrigan and Peggy Fleming are among a bevy of figure skaters added to the cast of a benefit event this weekend in Washington, D.C., for victims of the midair collision and crash outside Ronald Reagan International Airport.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Blackhawks organist works his last game after 33 seasons with the team
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks organist Frank Pellico worked his last game with the team on Sunday night after spending 33 seasons with the organization.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mystics trade 2-time All-Star Ariel Atkins to the Sky for No. 3 pick in WNBA draft
item.description: The Washington Mystics accelerated their rebuild, trading two-time All-Star Ariel Atkins to the Chicago Sky for the No. 3 overall pick in this year's draft on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Match preview: San Diego FC set to make historic MLS debut against LA Galaxy
item.description: San Diego FC is set to take the field on Sunday for the first time in Major League Soccer, facing off against the reigning MLS Cup champions, LA Galaxy, at Dignity Health Sports Park -- a history making match.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Utah State sweeps San Diego State, 79-71
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - For just the second time first since joining the Mountain West Conference, Utah State sweeps San Diego State. Dexter Akanno scored a career-high 26 points, making 7-of-9 three-pointers to lead the Aggies to a 79-71 win over the Aztecs Saturday night at The Spectrum.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Armstrong excited about last two months of season
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - With 56 games down and 26 to go, the Utah Hockey Club is right in the mix for a playoff spot in its first season in Salt Lake City.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Suspects charged in connection to burglaries of several pro athletes
item.description: Seven Chilean nationals face federal charges related to the burglaries of several high profile athletes' homes.
item.dc:creator: Brian Dulle, WGN 9
